messages.meta.name: TangMo
messages.index.title: About TangMo
messages.index.aboutMe.title: Hewwo!
messages.index.aboutMe.imageCaption: TangMo often use da defauwt “Anemo” dwagon avataw in VWChat
messages.index.aboutMe.para: It’s TangMo fwom Thaiwand, wiving faw fwom home. Da name witewawwy twanswates to “watewmewon”. I’d be happy to chat about stuff fwom tech, photogwaphy, to daiwy dose of fuwwy memes. I spend a wot of time on VWChat, usuawwy as da defauwt “Anemo” avataw (pictuwed). See ya awound!
messages.index.aboutChara.title: About da chawactew
messages.index.aboutChara.imageAlt: Bust shot painting of TangMo’s chawactew
messages.index.aboutChara.para: Yet anuthew bwue wowf among 23,547 othews in da fandom. He… exists…? I just put him in dwawings sometimes.
messages.nav.title: TangMo
messages.contact.title: Tawk to me!
messages.contact.note: Befowe sending a message, haz a quick wook at {link}. If uu send me a “Hewwo” with nuthing ewse,
messages.contact.note_img_alt: Stickew depicting a smiwing wowf howding a basebaww bat with menacing auwa
messages.bookingApp.booking.title: Book My Body!
messages.bookingApp.booking.intro: Want to pway with me? Pewhaps in pwivate? Wequest booking hewe!
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_info: What do uu want to do to me uwu?
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_notice: Once uu submit da fowm, I wiww weview da wequest and send uu quotation on Tewegwam.
messages.bookingApp.result.title: Eww…
messages.bookingApp.result.content: You might haz taken da joke too sewiouswy. But if uu awe weawwy bowed, uu feew fwee to come {link}.
messages.reference.title: Chawactew Wefewence
messages.reference.image_alt: Wefewence image fow da bwue wowf chawactew, showing back and fwont view.
messages.reference.note_for_geek: Note fow geeks: twy disabwing Javascwipt 😉
messages.reference.h_note.para: Those who don’t mind something… UwU, {link}~
messages.reference-h.title: Vowny Note
messages.reference-h.image_alt: A giant wowf mouth with smaww bwue wowf westing at da innew-end of its pink tongue. Thewe centew of da tongue is dyed in white and bwue, depicting da twaiw of whewe da smaww wowf haz been.
messages.reference-h.p1: If uu’ve been fowwowing me fow a whiwe, it is nu secwet that I am into vowe and muscwes. Specificawwy, I wove being da pwey in soft-vowe with ideawwy both pawty having a muscuwaw buiwd. Goo-ey digestion is da fuwthest I’d go. Thus, this chawactew is intended to be a pwey, but with a fun gimmick.
messages.reference-h.p2: When da towso awea is wet, it can wewease some ink with da same cowouw as its fuw pattewn. If on a pwed’s tongue, this ink wouwd weave tempowawy mawk, simiwaw to cowouw fwom a wowwipop ow shush. Passewby couwd wecognize da cowouw pattewn and knuw who is inside. Despite da wook, da body is {em} mewting.
messages.reference-h.p2_details: This twait was supposed to be a defense mechanism, simiwaw that of a squid. Howevew, da evowution haz nut caught up, weaving him with this ineffective powew. Da ink secwetion is vowuntawy, but when stawtwed ow scawed, it may be unintentionawwy weaked by instinct. Since da dye can onwy be weweased when wet, this wouwdn’t be a pwobwem day-to-day as da body wouwd be dwy.
messages.reference-h.p3: Despite intending to be a pwey, a few fwiends haz awweady mentioned to that this chawactew wook mowe wike a pwed. In fact, I do haz a supew-powew idea fow a pwed chawactew. If uu’we intewested, {c}!
